app.title: Games
app.subtitle: A collection of browser games and game tools for your next game night.

sheets.title: Game Sheets
sheets.subtitle: Select a game to open your personal score sheet.

sheets.name: Game Sheets
sheets.description: Score sheets for Phase 10, Kniffel and more.

sudoku.name: Sudoku
sudoku.description: Generate and solve Sudoku puzzles. See exactly how the backtracking algorithm creates a valid grid.

2048.description: Merge tiles to reach 2048. Choose a 4×4, 6×6, or 8×8 grid and keep playing after you win.

minesweeper.name: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: Clear the board without hitting a mine. Flag suspicious cells and use logic to survive.

2048.subtitle: Merge tiles to reach 2048 – and beyond!
2048.chooseSize: Choose your grid size to start playing.
2048.wonMessage: Keep going to achieve an even higher score.
2048.keyboardHint: Use arrow keys or swipe to move tiles.

pwa.updateDescription: A new version of the app is ready. Click update to get the latest features.

phase10.name: Phase 10
phase10.description: Complete all 10 phases before your opponents. Track your phases and score each round.

kniffel.name: Kniffel
kniffel.description: Roll the dice and score in 13 categories. Play classic 5-dice or Extrem 6-dice variant.

notizblock.name: Notepad
notizblock.description: Add players, tap their name to enter points, and tap the total to review and edit every entry later.

wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.description: Bid how many tricks you'll win each round, then record the actual result. Score 20 + 10 per trick if correct, or lose 10 per trick difference if wrong.

nochmal.name: Noch Mal!
nochmal.description: Digital score sheet for Noch Mal! Cross off cells in five colors across 15 columns, collect column and color bonuses and watch out for stars. Hold landscape for best view.

nochmal.title: Noch Mal!
nochmal.portraitWarning: Hold your device sideways for a better view. The page rotates automatically.
nochmal.resetBody: All marks, bonuses and jokers will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
nochmal.infoIntro: The goal is to score points with as many crosses as possible. The active player rolls six dice: three color dice and three number dice.
nochmal.infoRule1: After the active player has chosen a dice combination, the other players may choose a color and number combination from the remaining dice. The first 3 rolls are available to all players.
nochmal.infoRule2: The first mark must start in column H; after that, new fields must touch horizontally or vertically.
nochmal.infoRule3: The black X and the question mark are jokers. Each used joker removes one ! slot from the sheet.
nochmal.infoRule4: The game ends once someone reaches the second color bonus. Scoring includes color bonuses, column bonuses, unused jokers, and stars that were not crossed off.

wizard.title: Wizard
wizard.setupDescription: Add at least 2 players to start. Each round, enter bids then actual tricks won.
wizard.mpReadyToStart: Connected to a room. Start the game to begin tracking your rounds.
wizard.scoringCorrect: Bid correct: 20 points + 10 per trick won
wizard.scoringWrong: Bid wrong: −10 points per trick difference
wizard.emptyState: Tap "Next round" to start recording bids and tricks.
wizard.waitingForBids: Waiting for all players to lock their bid…
wizard.waitingForTricks: Waiting for all players to enter their tricks…
wizard.resetBody: This will clear all players and every round. This cannot be undone.

notepad.title: Notepad
notepad.setupDescription: Add all players first, then tap a name to add points during the game.
notepad.emptyState: No players yet. Add the first player to start tracking scores.
notepad.noEntries: No entries yet for this player.
notepad.resetBody: This removes all players and every saved score entry. This cannot be undone.

mp.shareCode: Share this code with the other players:

error.timeout: Connection timed out. Is the server reachable?
error.Room is full: This room is already full (max 10 players).

phase10.title: Phase 10
phase10.resetBody: This will clear all completed phases and your score history. This cannot be undone.
phase10.selectPhaseSetSubtitle: Select which phases you want to play this game.

phaseListAlt.description: 1 set of 4 + 1 run of 4 of one color
1 set of 5 + 1 run of 3 of one color

kniffel.title: Kniffel
kniffel.selectVariantSubtitle: Choose which variant you want to play.
kniffel.variantStandardDescription: Classic game with 5 dice and 13 categories.
kniffel.variantExtremDescription: Extended version with 6 dice and more scoring options.
kniffel.resetBody: This will clear all scores. This cannot be undone.

sudoku.title: Sudoku
sudoku.subtitle: Generate puzzles and learn how the backtracking algorithm works.

credits.title: Credits & Attribution
credits.author: Author
credits.changesDescription: Resized and optimized for web app icons
credits.licenseDescription: This icon is licensed under CC BY-SA 3.0. It requires attribution to the original author, a link to the license, and indication of any changes made.
credits.appDescription: Game Sheets is a Progressive Web App for tracking scores in board and card games. All game data is stored locally in your browser.

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.subtitle: Clear the board without hitting a mine.
minesweeper.chooseDifficulty: Choose a difficulty to start playing.
minesweeper.overMessage: You hit a mine. Better luck next time.
minesweeper.hint: Left-click to reveal · Right-click to flag · Double-click to chord
